nasb.text: ‘These are the appointed times of the Lord, holy convocations which you shall proclaim at the times appointed for them.

esv.text: “These are the appointed feasts of the Lord, the holy convocations, which you shall proclaim at the time appointed for them.

cnv.text: “以下是耶和華的節日，你們在這些指定的日期要召集聖會。

ccb.text: “以下是耶和华所定的节期，你们要在这些日子召开圣会。
